runs.summary: Master Services Agreement - Vendor Draft: 3 risk(s), 1 gap(s) and 3 mitigation action(s) identified. Top risk: Delayed service due to provider's discretion in sharing audit rights Main evidence gap: No specific owner is mentioned for the audit rights, data deletion policies, and service continuity plan actions.
warnings: No specific owner is mentioned for the audit rights, data deletion policies, and service continuity plan actions.
Open-ended questions may require additional human reading when the document has contextual ambiguity.

decision_summary.label: Renegotiate
decision_summary.summary: Master Services Agreement - Vendor Draft: 3 risk(s), 1 gap(s) and 3 mitigation action(s) identified. Top risk: Delayed service due to provider's discretion in sharing audit rights Main evidence gap: No specific owner is mentioned for the audit rights, data deletion policies, and service continuity plan actions.
decision_summary.due_date: Suspension of service without prior notice for suspected misuse

watchouts: No specific owner is mentioned for the audit rights, data deletion policies, and service continuity plan actions.
Open-ended questions may require additional human reading when the document has contextual ambiguity.
next_steps: Assign a clear owner for audit rights and ensure the provider shares detailed audit reports promptly.

top_blockers.title: Delayed service due to provider's discretion in sharing audit rights
top_blockers.recommendation: Assign a clear owner for audit rights and ensure the provider shares detailed audit reports promptly.

top_blockers.title: Unclear data deletion timeline post-termination
top_blockers.recommendation: Establish clear data deletion policies with specific timelines and procedures for data removal upon contract end.

business_impact.label: Impact 1
business_impact.detail: Potential delays in compliance verification and service disruptions could impact business operations.

business_impact.label: Impact 2
business_impact.detail: Data may persist longer than expected, leading to potential security risks.

findings.title: Delayed service due to provider's discretion in sharing audit rights
findings.description: The agreement lacks specific owner details for audit rights, which could lead to delays in compliance verification.
findings.recommendation: Assign a clear owner for audit rights and ensure the provider shares detailed audit reports promptly.
findings.snippet: No customer audit right. Provider may instead share a summary letter or certification at its discretion.

findings.title: Unclear data deletion timeline post-termination
findings.description: The agreement does not specify commercially reasonable efforts to delete customer data following termination, which could result in data persisting longer than expected.
findings.recommendation: Establish clear data deletion policies with specific timelines and procedures for data removal upon contract end.
findings.snippet: No commercially reasonable efforts to delete Customer Data following termination. No deletion deadline is stated.

findings.title: Suspension of service without prior notice for suspected misuse
findings.description: The agreement allows the provider to suspend service with commercially reasonable notice, which could lead to service disruptions.
findings.recommendation: Clarify the notice period and ensure that service suspensions are only applied in critical cases.
findings.snippet: Provider may suspend service for any suspected misuse with commercially reasonable notice when practicable.

evidence_trail.title: Delayed service due to provider's discretion in sharing audit rights
evidence_trail.snippet: No customer audit right. Provider may instead share a summary letter or certification at its discretion.

evidence_trail.title: Unclear data deletion timeline post-termination
evidence_trail.snippet: No commercially reasonable efforts to delete Customer Data following termination. No deletion deadline is stated.

evidence_trail.title: Suspension of service without prior notice for suspected misuse
evidence_trail.snippet: Provider may suspend service for any suspected misuse with commercially reasonable notice when practicable.
